docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCOSH, SEAN E AS TO DEFENDANT ELARMS, LUTHER IND & DBA OFF PLAZA
